title: horkelia californica subsp. frondosa
intro: Horkelia californica subsp. frondosa, also known as the California horkelia or frondosum horkelia, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the saxifrage family that is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The medicinal properties of Horkelia californica subsp. frondosa are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, providing potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or infusion, and has also been used in herbal preparations such as salves and tinctures to treat various health issues.
